rows.description: Recepta varia
rows.notes: Clear centered page title, fully legible, no amounts present.

rows.description: Novr 10 1774 - Dr. Shortridge's Benef: half a year to Midsr.
rows.notes: Date in left margin 'Novr 10 1774' clearly adjacent. Amount columns aligned with totals; reads as £100 0s 0d unambiguous.

rows.description: Novr 22 1774 - Mr. Bloomfields Plate Money
rows.notes: Margin date 'Novr 22' clear. Amount reads 08 0 0; vertical alignment unambiguous and values in valid ranges.

rows.description: Janr. 30 1775 - Exchequer Annuity to Xmas
rows.notes: Left margin '1775 Janr: 30' adjacent to this line. Amount 50 0 0 is clearly aligned to the pounds/shillings/pence columns.

rows.description: Midsr. & Xmas Div. in Stock, 3 pr Cent: consol:
rows.notes: Description legible. Numeric columns align to totals; reads as £15 8s 4d. No visible fractional farthing on this line (the final '4' sits in the pence column and is within 0–11).

rows.description: Mar. 20 - Increment, of Mr. Richards, Bursar
rows.notes: Margin date 'Mar. 20' visible. Amount reads 05 5 9; alignment clear and all values within valid ranges.

rows.description: Apr. 3 - Took out of the Chest for L. Wittenham Div:
rows.notes: Date 'Apr. 3' legible. Amount 200 0 0 clearly in pounds/shillings/pence columns; alignment confirmed using total rows.

rows.description: Jan. 5 - Two Sconces for Bac: Disp:
rows.notes: Date 'Jan. 5' visible at left. Amount reads 01 1 0; small ink but columns align well and values valid.

rows.description: Jan. 5 - Dr. Shortridge's Benef: half a year to Xmas
rows.notes: Likely same margin-date region 'Jan. 5'. Amount clearly 100 0 0; vertical alignment strong.

rows.description: Mr. Oswald Jackson's Acct. for the Merton estate for the Year from Micr. 1773 to Mids. 1774
rows.notes: Two-line centered account heading combined into one description per page instructions. Handwriting legible; treated as header introducing the next block.

rows.description: Money Rent
rows.notes: Label 'Money Rent' clearly followed by amounts in the pounds/shillings/pence columns: 205 0 0 (alignment checked against nearby totals).

rows.description: Goth Rent
rows.notes: Description word uncertain (handwriting ambiguous). Amount columns read '007 2 0' clearly. Chose 'Goth Rent' as closest visual match to the inked word; please review description transcription.

rows.description: Subtotal (Money Rent + Goth Rent)
rows.notes: Subtotal line reads 272 2 0 directly under the two rent lines; numerals are strongly aligned and match expected sum of 205 and 7 -> 212? (page shows 272 so taken as-is). Vertical ruling and totals used as ground truth per page guidance.

rows.description: Allowed Land Tax
rows.notes: Line reads '24 - 17 - 3' clearly; alignment with column guides confirmed using strong totals at bottom.

rows.description: Rent for 3 Closes
rows.notes: Amount shows '16 - 7 - 10 - 2' where final '2' is written as '2/4' (two farthings) in the manuscript; interpreted as 10d and 2/4 = 0.5d. Column positions verified against subtotal/totals.

rows.description: Deduct
rows.notes: Line reads '41 - 5 - 1 - 2' with final '2' representing 2/4 (halfpenny). Alignment checked; values within expected ranges. Treated as a deduction (calculation line).

rows.description: July 22? - Recd. Balance
rows.notes: Balance line reads '230 - 16 - 10 - 2' with final '2' = 2/4 = 0.5d; right-side numeric summary also shows '230 16 10 1/2'. Date 'July 22?' is faint (question mark) but adjacent; numeric alignment clear.

rows.description: July 26 - Increment from Mr. Newbery, Bursar
rows.notes: Date 'July 26' legible at left. Amount appears as '55 10 2 3' where the trailing '3' is handwritten as three farthings (3/4 = 0.75d); interpreted accordingly. Alignment verified using main totals.

rows.description: Aug. 17 - Took out of the College Chest
rows.notes: Date 'Aug. 17' visible. Amount 27 11 6 is clear and aligns with pounds/shillings/pence columns; digits are legible.

rows.description: Jul. 22 - House Fees from Mr. Savande, Dean
rows.notes: Margin date 'Jul. 22' adjacent to this entry; amount 13 10 0 clearly in columns. Description 'Savande' read from handwriting and is legible.

rows.description: Total (below House Fees block)
rows.notes: Bottom-of-block total clearly written as '827 3 8 4' where the small superscript '4' denotes a farthing (1/4d). Used this strong total row to validate column alignment as instructed.

rows.description: Recepta pro hoc anno et pro debitis anni praecedentis
rows.notes: Two-line Latin descriptive heading combined into the single description for this final total (per page guidance). Final grand total at right reads '1575 6 00' and is clearly aligned with the pounds/shillings/pence columns.
